title: Turn notifications into tasks
excerpt:
Description
When a team member sends a notification, we need to be able to turn selested notifications into tasks. 
What are you trying to achieve
Not forgetting to do something important. 
Improve workflow.

posts.author: Loti (Loti C Woods)
